headlines.title: Iranians Live With Pain and Powerlessness, Beneath a Smooth Veneer
headlines.summary: After months of upheaval, many are attempting to get on with their lives while quietly grappling with grief, economic stress and a loss of hope.

headlines.title: Attacks on Jewish Targets in Europe Suggest Hybrid Warfare
headlines.summary: Officials are investigating similar attacks across Europe, all claimed by a shadowy Islamist group that may be using low-cost, unsophisticated methods to sow fear in Jewish communities.

headlines.title: Mother Runs for Office in India After Daughter Was Raped and Killed
headlines.summary: Ratna Debnath is a candidate for Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s party, which is campaigning on women’s safety in an Indian state election.

headlines.title: Iceland’s Pools and Hot Tubs Are Now UNESCO-Recognized. Some Locals Aren’t Thrilled.
headlines.summary: Iceland’s swimming pools and hot tubs serve as hubs of social life, a cultural distinction recently honored by UNESCO. Some Icelanders aren’t so thrilled.

headlines.title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Signals Plan to Maintain Control Over Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei said in a statement that Iran would establish “new legal frameworks” for the Strait of Hormuz. He also said his country would retain its nuclear capabilities.

headlines.title: Iran says US siege of ports ‘intolerable’, Trump says war ‘might’ resume
Trump says soaring US petrol prices will ‘drop like a rock’ after Iran war
Hegseth testifies on Iran war before Senate committee: Key takeaways
RSF condemns ‘kidnapping’ of three journalists on board Gaza aid flotilla
US passes law to resume DHS funding and end partial government shutdown
Trump gives the go-ahead for a major new Canada-U.S. oil pipeline
headlines.summary: More state and federal approvals are needed for the 3-foot-wide Bridger Pipeline Expansion, which would stretch from the Canadian border with Montana down through eastern Montana and Wyoming, where it would link up with another pipeline.

headlines.title: Will.i.am wants to future-proof a new generation
headlines.summary: The Black Eyed Peas co-founder turned entrepreneur is now teaching a class on "agentic AI" for Arizona State.

headlines.title: Trump pulls Casey Means' stalled surgeon general nomination, announces new pick
headlines.summary: President Trump says he's nominating former Fox News Channel contributor Dr. Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after Dr. Casey Means' path forward stalled in the Senate over questions about her experience and her stance on vaccines.

headlines.title: U.S. House primaries in Louisiana are suspended after Voting Rights Act ruling
headlines.summary: Louisiana suspended its upcoming primaries for the U.S. House, following Wednesday's U.S. Supreme Court ruling that the state's congressional map is an "unconstitutional racial gerrymander."

headlines.title: In real-world test, an AI model did better than ER doctors at diagnosing patients
headlines.summary: Researchers evaluated how well an AI model could diagnose and make decisions about patient care.

headlines.title: BP criticized over surging profits following Iran war
headlines.summary: The United Kingdom-based oil and gas giant BP is facing criticism after reporting its profits more than doubled in the first quarter of the year, following a spike in oil prices since the Iran war began.

headlines.title: UAE exits oil groupings, eyes more output
headlines.summary: The United Arab Emirates is set to substantially ramp up its oil production capacity after quitting the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and the broader OPEC+ alliance effective Friday, making a pivotal shift at a time when the war between the United States, Israel and Iran has triggered an energy crisis and roiled the global economy.

headlines.title: UK lawmakers reject Mandelson inquiry
headlines.summary: United Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer has escaped having a parliamentary inquiry opened into his appointment of Peter Mandelson to be the country’s ambassador to the United States, as the controversy that has dominated domestic politics recently shows no sign of going away.

headlines.title: US Fed keeps interest rate unchanged amid high energy prices
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON-- The US Federal Reserve on Wednesday decided to maintain its target range for the federal funds rate at 3.5-3.75 percent as high energy prices added inflation pressures.

headlines.title: Beijing invites more to join Group of Friends of Global Governance
headlines.summary: China on Wednesday called on other like-minded countries to join the Group of Friends of Global Governance, following the launch of the group's Vienna chapter a day earlier.

headlines.title: Italy told to avoid sharing of defence tech with Pakistan
headlines.summary: Rajnath Singh urges Italy to avoid sharing defense technology with Pakistan during bilateral talks on security and cooperation.

headlines.title: Delhi court grants bail to I-PAC director Vinesh Chandel after no objection from ED
headlines.summary: I-PAC director Vinesh Chandel granted bail in money laundering case.

headlines.title: On first Ladakh visit since violence, Amit Shah to join exposition of holy relics of Lord Buddha in Leh
headlines.summary: Amit Shah visits Ladakh for the first international exposition of Buddha relics, coinciding with Buddha Purnima celebrations.

headlines.title: J&K police file case over ‘dissemination of secessionist video’
headlines.summary: J&K Police file case against individuals for sharing secessionist videos, warning against unlawful content dissemination to maintain public peace.

headlines.title: Centre notifies changes to Citizenship Rules; focus on OCI registration
headlines.summary: The government updates Citizenship Rules, 2026, enhancing OCI registration with digital applications and streamlined processes for cardholders.

headlines.title: US official says Iran war truce 'terminated' hostilities for war powers deadline
